title: EventAttributes
description: The attributes of an event returned from the Events Explorer

title.description: The event title as displayed in the Events Explorer

message.description: The event body text containing details about the event

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the event was recorded

host.description: The hostname associated with this event

tags.description: List of tags associated with the event in key:value format

alert_type.description: The alert type category for visual display

aggregation_key.description: The arbitrary string used to group related events into a rollup

source_type_name.description: The source technology or integration that generated this event

attributes.description: Custom key-value attributes associated with the event
